name: Ajinkya

projects.title: Project One Test
projects.tagline: Design system for a SaaS analytics dashboard.
projects.summary: Built a polished analytics experience with a scalable design system, rapid onboarding, and conversion-focused storytelling.

sections.title: Context
description: A growing SaaS platform needed a new onboarding journey that showcased real-time analytics while reinforcing trust.
I partnered with the founders to rethink the narrative, craft reusable UI building blocks, and ensure the design translated cleanly to production.

sections.title: Outcome
description: Within six weeks the product launched with a cohesive design system and interactive onboarding tour.
highlights: 36% lift in trial-to-paid conversion after launch
Reusable components documented for the internal dev team

projects.title: Project Two
projects.tagline: Full-stack web app for an e-learning marketplace.
projects.summary: Designed and engineered a course marketplace with personalized recommendations, instructor dashboards, and secure payments.

sections.title: Discovery
description: Worked with the founding team to map user journeys for learners and instructors, prioritising features for the initial MVP.

sections.title: Build
description: Implemented a modular UI kit and analytics layer so operators could measure cohort performance from day one.
highlights: Launched MVP in 8 weeks with live payments

projects.title: Project Three
projects.tagline: Brand refresh and site for a creative studio.
projects.summary: Refreshed the brand identity, created motion-rich storytelling, and delivered a CMS-powered site the studio can evolve in-house.

sections.title: Brand System
description: Created a flexible typographic scale, color palette, and component library to keep marketing assets consistent.

sections.title: Experience
description: Story-driven sections highlight the studio’s craft with subtle micro-interactions and rich media support.
highlights: Organic traffic grew 2× within the first month
Handed off reusable CMS blocks for future case studies

projects.title: Project Four
projects.tagline: Marketing automation for a B2B fintech platform.
projects.summary: Enabled the marketing team to launch personalized landing pages backed by data automation and performance reporting.

sections.title: Problem
description: The marketing organisation lacked a reusable landing page framework and had limited insight into campaign performance.

sections.title: Solution
description: Delivered a component-based library with automated lead routing and analytics stitched into their existing martech stack.
highlights: Reduced campaign launch time from 10 days to 48 hours
Marketing qualified leads increased by 28% quarter-over-quarter

projects.title: Project Five
projects.tagline: Internal tooling for a product support team.
projects.summary: Created a unified support console with contextual knowledge base surfacing and real-time collaboration cues.

sections.title: Research
description: Shadowed support agents to uncover friction, then mapped the service blueprint from intake to resolution.

sections.title: Impact
description: Rolled out phased improvements that reduced average handle time while keeping customer satisfaction above 95%.
highlights: New agent ramp time shortened to 5 days

projects.title: Project Six
projects.tagline: 3D marketing experience for a product launch.
projects.summary: Built an immersive 3D experience that showcased hero product features and integrated seamlessly with the launch campaign.

sections.title: Concept
description: Collaborated with the hardware team to storyboard feature reveals and interactive moments tied to campaign messaging.

sections.title: Launch
description: Coordinated the production hand-off, ensuring the 3D environment worked across devices and compressed for fast delivery.
highlights: Over 120k unique visitors during launch week
Average session duration tripled compared to previous campaigns

services.title: Art Direction
services.description: We help with the creation and development of online advertising ideas, with particular focus on their visual appearance.

services.title: Branding
services.description: We design key brand elements such as the logo, color scheme, typography, and other design components that makes your brand stand out from competitors.

services.title: Web Design
services.description: We build and optimize your online presence.  Website is the digital entry point into your business and a powerful revenue channel.

services.title: 3D Design
services.description: We combine creative design and technical skills to build striking 3D visualisations that bring your project to life.

resume.tagline: 👋  I'm a software engineer, product designer.
resume.description: I have delivered world-class user experiences to millions of people. Well-versed with React, Javascript, and most of the Web frameworks.

experiences.bullets: Worked on the frontend of a React application, Worked on the frontend of a React application
